title: The Endless Dunes
lines: The sand is deep and hot, dragging at your boots. Behind you, the wooden door remains firmly vanished.
Under the strange, bruised-purple sky, the desert seems to stretch forever in every direction.
To the north, you see the metallic shimmer of something partially buried in the sand. To the west, a hazy patch of green suggests an oasis.

options.desc: 2. Head toward the patch of green
3. Look for footprints in the sand
